content: CSV parsing: papaparse v5.5.4 (npm) is the gold standard — zero deps, streaming, Web Worker support, handles malformed CSV well, browser-native. For React: use directly (react-papaparse wrapper adds overhead). OFX parsing: ofx-data-extractor v1.5.0 (TypeScript, browser-compatible, recently updated) is best choice. ofx-js exists but fewer recent commits. Recommended: papaparse + ofx-data-extractor, both imported directly in browser without server.
